hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');let ok=false;try{ok=fs.readFileSync('{path}','utf8').includes('// audited:ok')}catch(e){};console.log(ok?'STYLE REVIEW: OK':'STYLE REVIEW FAILED: every solution file MUST contain the exact line \u002F\u002F audited:ok .
